allow: PowerShell($path = "C:\\repositories\\tradingApp\\frontend\\app\\page.tsx"; $lines = Get-Content $path -Encoding UTF8; $keep = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { $n = $i + 1; if \(\($n -ge 316 -and $n -le 445\) -or \($n -ge 738 -and $n -le 771\) -or \($n -ge 781 -and $n -le 1445\)\) { continue }; $keep.Add\($lines[$i]\) }; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines\($path, $keep, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); Write-Output "Antes: $\($lines.Count\) — Después: $\($keep.Count\)")
